heading: Insurance policies
label: 7270 Insurance policies
text: Any person who fails to comply with the requirements of section 4374 (relating to liability for tax on policies issued by foreign insurers), with intent to evade the tax shall, in addition to other penalties provided therefor, pay a fine of double the amount of the tax.
notes: Amendments1976— substituted “liability for tax on policies issued by foreign insurers” for “the affixing of stamps on insurance policies, etc.”.Pub. L. 94–455

Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first month which begins more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 94–455section 1904(d) of Pub. L. 94–455section 4041 of this titleOct. 4, 1976
